pages.title: Alter Ego
pages.purpose: The interactive product: take the questionnaire and get your result.

props.intro: Free, forever. Answer 5 quick, revealing questions and meet your Alter Ego.
props.pattern: Ask -> Generate -> Reveal -> Capture -> Reward -> Share

pages.title: About
pages.purpose: Customer-facing statement of what this product gives you.

props.text:
FREE, forever. Paste nothing — just answer 5 quick, revealing questions. In
under a minute you see your Alter Ego card (your coined archetype, a one-line
metaphor, a few traits, a motto). Enter your email and, right on screen, you get
your full reading PLUS two more cards worth posting: your Friend Group Ego (who
you are to the people around you) and your Shadow Ego (the person you almost were).
The email is the only ask, and it is the delivery of real extra value, not a gate.
There is NO paid tier now (deliberate — this is an audience play). The only CTA is
soft: "built by Scott MacLean, who runs a one-person company of AI agents — see
what else the machine builds" -> macleanmarket.com + an optional subscribe.
Designed from day one to also be GIFTABLE as a free add-on bonus that can bolt
onto any future MacLean offer.

acceptance: the questionnaire renders and can be submitted
submitting returns a complete result with no empty fields
the result is a templated CSS/HTML card, not a per-user generated image
email capture records the contact before the full result is shown
the app degrades cleanly on mobile and with reduced motion
